jobs.title: Instructional Technology Specialist
jobs.description: Support staff and students with ed-tech integration across K-12. Google Workspace and Canvas preferred.

jobs.title: EdTech Curriculum Coordinator
jobs.description: Lead district-wide curriculum design with blended learning focus. PA Academic Standards required.

jobs.title: High School Business & Marketing Teacher
jobs.description: Teach Principles of Business, Marketing, and Finance. NBEA certification a plus.

jobs.title: Computer Science Teacher (9–12)
jobs.description: Teach AP CS Principles and intro coding. Python or Scratch experience. Project-based learning.

jobs.title: Curriculum Developer — Digital Learning
jobs.description: Design standards-aligned digital curriculum for middle and high school students. Collaborate with instructional designers.

jobs.title: Instructional Designer — Corporate
jobs.description: Create e-learning content and blended training programs using Articulate 360. Education background preferred.

jobs.title: Utilization Review Physical Therapist
jobs.description: Review PT documentation for medical necessity. Approve or deny insurance authorizations using evidence-based criteria. Prior UR experience preferred but not required.

jobs.title: Clinical Reviewer — Physical Therapist
jobs.description: Evaluate medical records against clinical criteria for rehab services. Collaborate with medical directors on complex cases. Active PT license required.

jobs.title: Prior Authorization Specialist — PT
jobs.description: Review prior auth requests for physical and occupational therapy services. Apply clinical guidelines to determine appropriate level of care.

jobs.title: Licensed Appeal Writer
jobs.description: Write clinical appeals for denied PT/OT/rehab claims on behalf of hospital clients. Must hold active clinical license. Strong writing and documentation skills required.

jobs.title: Orthopedic Clinical Specialist — Sales
jobs.description: Support orthopedic sales reps in OR and clinic settings. Provide clinical education on joint replacement and sports med product lines. PT background highly valued.
jobs.keyword: medical device clinical specialist physical therapist

jobs.title: Rehab Operations Director
jobs.description: Oversee clinical operations across outpatient PT clinics in PA region. Lead therapist hiring, compliance, and quality programs. 3+ years of leadership experience.

jobs.title: Clinical Education Coordinator — PT
jobs.description: Coordinate clinical placement and student education programs for DPT students. Manage affiliation agreements and CI communications. Remote-eligible.

jobs.title: Remote Health Coach — Physical Therapy
jobs.description: Guide members through digital MSK programs using PT expertise. Async coaching model — no live patient treatment. Flexible hours. PT license required.
